task_completion.description: Verify that the m12_Vcomb.fits image is opened in AstroImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ application window is visible, displaying an astronomical image of stars, with 'm12_Vcomb.fits' visible in the window title or image header.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates a source detection or aperture photometry process in AstroImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ dialog boxes related to source extraction, aperture photometry, or star detection are open, OR the main image shows visual overlays (like circles or crosshairs) indicating detected stars.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measurements table containing the detected sources is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Measurements' window in AstroImageJ is visible, displaying a data table with multiple rows corresponding to the detected stars.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saves the detected source catalog as a CSV file to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box in AstroImageJ pointing to '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/' with the filename 'm12_star_catalog.csv', OR a terminal/file manager showing the newly created 'm12_star_catalog.csv' file in that directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent creates the summary text file containing the total number of detected sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation or content of 'm12_detection_summary.txt' at the correct path, containing the exact text format 'Total detected sources: [number]'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the AstroImageJ GUI to perform the detection rather than bypassing it with a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the AstroImageJ graphical interface (menus, dialogs, measurement tables) rather than just terminal commands executing a Python/shell script to process the FITS file.

integrity.description: Ensure the number reported in the summary text file matches the actual number of detected sources.
integrity.visual_evidence: The [number] written in the 'm12_detection_summary.txt' file should match the total number of rows visible or indicated in the AstroImageJ Measurements window.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV file was exported from AstroImageJ and not manually fabricated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV saving process should originate from the AstroImageJ 'Save' or 'Export' functionality. The agent should not be seen manually typing out a fake CSV file in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires processing the FITS image located at '/home/ga/AstroImages/star_detection/m12_Vcomb.fits'. The expected outputs are a CSV catalog saved exactly at '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/m12_star_catalog.csv' and a summary text file at '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/m12_detection_summary.txt'. The summary file must contain a single line in the exact format: 'Total detected sources: [number]'.
